# Proppo

> Proppo is an all-in-one property management software for hospitality businesses. It helps hotels, hostels, homestays, and vacation rentals manage their operations from a single platform.

## What Proppo Does

Proppo is a SaaS platform that provides:
- **Channel Manager**: Sync rates and availability across OTAs (Booking.com, Airbnb, Expedia, etc.) to prevent overbookings
- **Property Management System (PMS)**: Manage reservations, front desk operations, and guest data
- **Booking Engine**: Accept direct bookings on your own website
- **Revenue Management**: Monitor competitor pricing and optimize your rates
- **Inventory Management**: Update room inventory from a single dashboard

## Target Customers

- Hotels and boutique hotels
- Hostels and backpacker accommodations
- Homestays and bed & breakfasts
- Vacation rentals and serviced apartments
- Property managers handling multiple listings
